title: Experiential Retail Concepts Drive New Tenant Demand in Premium Locations
summary: Experiential retail tenants are accounting for a growing share of new leasing activity in top-tier shopping destinations, according to a new ICSC report. Concepts ranging from immersive dining to fitness and wellness studios are filling vacancies left by traditional soft goods retailers. The shift is pushing landlords to rethink tenant mix strategies and invest in flexible build-out packages.
